base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should increase squeeze_long average PnL and possibly total net profit while keeping trade count near baseline and preserving low MAE. Main tradeoff is slower exits or fewer squeeze trades if the higher target and slope confirmation are too selective; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001, trade count drops over 10%, PnL/exposure falls, or squeeze MAE worsens materially.
label: promote
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_b_squeeze_long_take_profit. The latest pullback expansion was low-quality exposure, while 1DTE tightening and call-wall loosening have already failed. Squeeze_long remains underexplored, highly efficient, and clean, so the next non-duplicate test should be a stronger but still bounded squeeze upside-capture run using only profile-specific TP and momentum keys.
